---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project (e.g. adding a new industrial protocol parser)
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I need to parse IEC 104 ASDU Type ID 100 interrogation commands..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what parser logic, function mappings, or rules you want added.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, standard protocol drafts, or payload examples here.
